The '''Kaminoan droid''' was a model of [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droid]] used by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

===Regular model===
The Kaminoan droids resembled the waitress droid [[FLO/Legends|FLO]], a [[WA-7 waitress droid/Legends|WA-7 Service Unit]].

===Forager model===
[[File:Kaminoan_Forager.png|thumb|right|A Kaminoan droid Forager.]]
This model utilized a long pole for foraging plants.

===Carbon Collector model===
This model utilized a two-winged pole in front that acted as a scanner to detect traces of carbon in the ground or nearby.

===Nova Carrier/Ore Collector model===
This model utilized a mobile scanner unit in front of it to detect any nova or ore deposits for collection.

===Fisher model===
This model possessed a fishing pole for the purpose of catching aquatic life near the shore.

===Builder/repairer model===
[[File:Kaminoan_Builder_Repairer.png|thumb|right|A Kaminoan droid builder/repairer.]]

This model had its arms modified to accompany tools for the purpose of construction and/or repairing various buildings owned by the GAR.

===Farmer model===
This model had a basket grafted onto it for the purpose of harvesting farming plants.

===Herder model===
This model has a sensor on its right arm. That guided and herded animals towards it.

===Hunter model===
This model has a two-pronged gun on its right arm that allowed it to kill animals that it was hunting for [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] for the GAR.

==Appearances==
{{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Kaminoan droids}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
